creator: nicolas.raspail@whisperingvault.net
text:
Hi

I have upgraded my nzbget port to 10.2 and I still have this problem.

After adding CONFIGURE_ARGS+= --enable-sigchld-handler in the Makefile, 
the postprocess script has a correct status

Nicolas
